title: What are the big round spinny things on plugsuit wrists
display_title: What are the big round spinny things on plugsuit wrists
wikitext:
[]: What are the big round spinny things on plugsuit wrists?             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 08, 2013 4:05 pm [Split from "3.33 Things you noticed" . - Monk] During the battle in Lilith's chamber, when Shinji makes EVA-13 grab the blades of EVA-02's weapon, during the shot of his hands being burned because of the mental link, the round parts oon the wrists of Shinji's plugsuit are glowing red and rotating, the as the round parts in Mari's 2.0 plugsuit were doing during Beast mode(except the light was were green then) : SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Jul 08, 2013 4:23 pm Perhaps they signify that a higher level of synchronization than normal is occurring.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jul 08, 2013 5:34 pm Or that lightshow, in Shinji's case, is part of commanding the RS-Hoppers. Spining is just something these... spinning things seem to do .

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 08, 2013 5:48 pm Well, the purple light in Shinji's palm are obviously the representation of the damage and pain he feels through the mental link with EVA-13, the difference being the color(in every other case the glow was yellow), but I don't think that the red spinning thing was part of commanding the RS-Hoppers, since by the time Shinji grabbed Asuka's blades the Hoppers were already all destroyed.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jul 08, 2013 5:57 pm ...right, scrap that theory. Maybe just a generic omen of impending doom.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Jul 08, 2013 6:04 pm I think what's interesting is the fact that Shinji and Kaworu's Eva-13 plugsuits are so similar to Mari's original plugsuit from 2.0. [Below is a response ElMariachi made to this post, cut from a post that was otherwise not all about this topic. - Monk] ElMariachi wrote: Isn't that just that Mari's 05 plugsuit(and Kaworu's 06 plugsuit too by the way) are simply the next generation of plugsuits and maybe new ones for the other pilots were scheduled too, but then N3I threw everything through the window, and neo-NERV kept the general design through the years, while WILLE made their own version? Still why ReiQ's plugsuit desing is different needs to be explained, in the 3.0 CRC probably.(maybe she needs a special one because Mark.09 is an ADAM's Vessel?)

[]:             Quote Post by andreh » Mon Jul 08, 2013 6:18 pm ElMariachi wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Mbryo » Tue Jul 09, 2013 5:37 am andreh wrote: Interesting. The EVA02 transformation hurt the pilot so maybe this is a sign of excessive pain? yeah! In Rebuild 2.22 Mari seemed to be connected with IPEA and Kaworu + EVA06 + Lunar Base things was all being done under the hood. Perhaps the "Mari plugsuit style" (also seen with Kaworu + EVA06) have any direct connection with IPEA (or at least symbolizes that Nerv is " latent ")?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jul 09, 2013 7:53 am Mbryo wrote: The Juusangouki has similiar rotating things on its hand, when it detaches its second pair of arms from its chestplate.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jul 09, 2013 8:34 am Well, ReiQ's plugsuit doesn't that the big round things in the wrist, nor the the two metallic round parts on both shoulders that Mari's 05, Shinji's 13 and Kaworu's 06 and 13 plugsuit have, and the white thingies on the ribs are noticeably smaller for the other's plugsuits(and is green instead of black), which makes it fairly different from the new NERV/SEELE models. That's why I wonder if it it's a special plugsuit made for piloting Mark.09 due to its ADAM's Vessel status.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Jul 09, 2013 2:07 pm The spinny disks might have some kind of secondary/tertiary drive function that interacts with/expands the Eva's control interface when it's doing something unusual, like Beast Mode or Four Arm Mode. As far as I remember, that's when they activate.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jul 09, 2013 2:51 pm ElMariachi wrote: Well, ReiQ's plugsuit doesn't that the big round things in the wrist, nor the the two metallic round parts on both shoulders that Mari's 05, Shinji's 13 and Kaworu's 06 and 13 plugsuit have, and the white thingies on the ribs are noticeably smaller for the other's plugsuits(and is green instead of black), which makes it fairly different from the new NERV/SEELE models. That's why I wonder if it it's a special plugsuit made for piloting Mark.09 due to its ADAM's Vessel status.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Jul 09, 2013 3:28 pm The CRC 2.0 refers to this new designs as Multipurpose (New Type) Plug Suit [汎用 (新型) プラグスーツ] and as (Mari Custom Livery)[マリ専用] or (Kaworu Custom Livery) [カヲル専用] Those are the official designations in english and Japanese as the book uses them. Mari also refers to it as shin gata (新型) when putting it on in 2.0. I wouldn't necessarily blame it on IPEA/Seele as I would on everyone involved deciding on a standard mass produced plugsuit vs all the old stuff Nerv Japan and Euro had laying around for the proto, test, provisional Evas. OMF asked for some 2.0 pics and all I have laying around is Kaworu. 06 汎用 (新型) プラグスーツ SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jul 09, 2013 4:57 pm The difference is practically just the black lower half, the green stripe and a haircut. Lol, they drew visible package on Q!Kaworu XD

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Tue Jul 09, 2013 5:53 pm Given their position and the tendency of the chest piece to glow at the same time, they strike me as some kind of secondary restraint to buffer the pilot from the Eva and prevent them from being tanged. Also they spin, and as a scientician I can tell you spinning is important to all forms of sciencecraft.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Jul 09, 2013 6:47 pm Forgot to add this last post. Remember this discarded idea? Plug Suit Beast Mode  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Tue Jul 09, 2013 11:56 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Remember this discarded idea?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 10, 2013 3:36 am One of the initial concept of the new model of plugsuit was that when Beast Mode is activated, the shoulder-pads opens and the metallic rounds things on them starts ejecting vapor while the rest of the suit tightens even more around the wearer's body while the veins starts to bulge, on top of the glowing and spiraling round thingies and the glowing of the eyes!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jul 10, 2013 1:00 pm So something that looked a little like Rei's angel penetration, and therefore more boobies? Why was this scrapped in the first place?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jul 10, 2013 3:04 pm That would have been really hot. I'm kinda disappointed we'll never see it.
